lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It is well-maintained, runs reliably, and has only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with regular use. All major systems are functional.
This car is in poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver, though it clearly shows its years of service. The exterior features several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the hood, and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery has some staining and the driver's seat shows significant wear, but all electronics and climate controls remain functional. Mechanically, it runs well, though it may require minor suspension work in the near future to address some road noise. It's a solid, honest car for someone looking for utility over aesthetics.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, a vehicle that transcends the standard used inventory to offer a true showroom-grade experience. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, this unit exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a cabin that retains its original, pristine integrity. Every mechanical component has been vetted to ensure peak performance, mirroring its initial factory delivery state. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and aesthetic distinction.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered its whole life, kept spotless, and runs like a total dream. If you've been looking for that 'perfect' find that's been loved inside and out, this is definitely the one. I'm happy to chat and answer any questions you have—let’s get you behind the wheel of this beauty!

This E46 M3 is a superlative specimen of the high-revving S54 platform, maintained to a rigorous mechanical standard. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six features individual throttle bodies and operates with perfect compression across all cylinders. Critical preventative maintenance has been comprehensively addressed, including a full VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement with treated shells. The chassis is structurally pristine, featuring a reinforced rear subframe to maintain optimal torsional rigidity under load. Power is delivered through a precise ZF 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional turn-in and exit traction. Riding on refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers, the suspension geometry remains factory-spec. This is an investment-grade vehicle with concours-level paint and an immaculate interior, free of the common wear typical of the marque.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior. Garage kept. Clean title in hand.

Offered here is a truly exceptional specimen that defies the typical expectations of a pre-owned vehicle. This car has been curated rather than merely owned, kept in a climate-controlled environment and shielded from the elements since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with a mirror-like finish, completely free of rock chips, door dings, or even the slightest swirl marks. The wheels are immaculate, with no curb rash, and are wrapped in premium tires with near-full tread depth. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of perfection; the leather remains supple and taut without a single crease or sign of bolster wear, and it still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the intricate climate control sensors, operates with precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is detailed to show-quality standards, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by master technicians. There are no leaks, no rattles, and the transmission shifts with seamless fluidity. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that is indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

We are proud to present this superlative example, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the 'mint' designation. The vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its first day on the road. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this automobile stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Can't wait for you to take it for a spin!

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3, a definitive specimen of high-revving Bavarian engineering. This example features the legendary S54B32 inline-six engine, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically, the vehicle is superlative: the rod bearings have been addressed with VAC coated shells, and the VANOS system has been completely overhauled with Beisan components for long-term timing stability. Power is managed via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and transmitted through a variable M differential lock. The chassis is structurally perfect, with a proactively reinforced rear subframe to ensure torsional rigidity. Finished in its original factory coating with zero paint meter discrepancies, the car retains all OEM aerodynamic underbody panels and original suspension kinematics. This is a concours-level vehicle for the enthusiast who demands mechanical perfection and historical integrity.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history included.
